data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. MIGHTY STAR was crowded for room and fell this course and distance last time. Suited here and worth another try. 7. SCOTT CLARITY finished well back at this track last time when a 9 length eighth (26.13) but scored three back at this track (22.37). Expected to run well. 8. SCOTT VICIOUS doesn't have the best strike-rate. Finished second (22.54) at Ballarat latest and might be close to finding winning form again. Expected to be in the finish again. 5. KIWI FRED has claims fresh from a recent placing in good time.","runners":[2,7,8,5],"exclusive":false}
